entries.name: Daniela Parra
entries.bio: learning to be a jack of all trades, mastering in community.
entries.vision: to live in a world outside of capitalism, that is centered  around community, nature, and people.
entries.why: we cannot be wageslaves for the rest of our lives. I yearn to have the time and freedom to frolick in the forests, work on cool projects that will actually benefit the people, and to live life the way it was meant to be lived!
entries.learning: front/back end development, regenerative agriculture, system/city planning, natural architecture, community building

entries.name: Alishba
entries.bio: Hi, I'm Alishba Khattak an Environmental Engineer sustainability enthusiast and Operations Manager with expertise in business operations, digital strategy and AI-driven innovation. I'm passionate about leveraging technology to solve climate challenges and building impactful sustainable ventures that create lasting value.
entries.vision: To build AI-powered sustainable solutions that empower people, protect the planet, and create lasting impact through entrepreneurship.
entries.why: Sustainability is more than a career for me; it is a responsibility. I believe AI and innovation can transform the way people live, consume, and protect the planet. My mission is to build impactful solutions that make sustainable choices simple, accessible, and scalable for everyone while creating a business that drives positive environmental change.
entries.learning: Learning about Ai, Machine learning and recent research about environmental challenges
